contests.title: Failed Generations Due to Enhanced Compatibility
contests.description: Generations with enhanced compatibility are causing images to fail and not be automatically refunded. Please make sure it's off!

metadata.title: Failed Generations Due to Enhanced Compatibility
metadata.content: Generations with enhanced compatibility are causing images to fail and not be automatically refunded. Please make sure it's off!

contests.title: A GPU Crunch, and Bumpy Days Ahead
contests.description: Our primary data center is pulling GPU support to switch to mining, on under 48 hours notice. Generation still works but will be slower while we move. Here is the full picture and what to expect.

metadata.title: A GPU Crunch, and Bumpy Days Ahead
metadata.content: Our primary data center is pulling GPU support to switch to mining, on under 48 hours notice. Generation still works but will be slower while we move. Here is the full picture and what to expect.
